summary: Solid code quality with concerning gaps. Workflow uses correct YAML practices (checkout@v4, permissions:read, set -euo pipefail, quoted vars) but Bun installation is unpinned—use setup-bun action or pin version. cli.ts has gratuitous `any` type for json parameter (line ~68, writeVersion function) violating explicit types requirement. Workflow references bumper.test.ts/cli.test.ts without verification they exist. Comment about excluding act.test.ts suggests incomplete grasp of external test harness requirement. Critical: workflow doesn't produce act-result.txt (required artifact per spec). Workflow doesn't validate output format—just displays files. References fixtures/ directory but not shown. bumper.ts is excellent (pure functions, clear types, good error messages). Overall: deliverable is incomplete relative to stated requirements (act-result.txt, full test harness, fixture validation).
